series_metadata.series_description: Documents pertaining to public requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor, redacted and un-redacted responsive records. Maintained to document compliance with public records law obligations (ORC 149.43).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
